title: clerodendrum angustifolium
intro: Clerodendrum angustifolium, also known as the Narrow-leaved Glory Bower, is a flowering plant species native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Clerodendrum angustifolium include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Clerodendrum angustifolium include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various ailments, from skin conditions to respiratory issues.
